subcodes.first_line: O scion of that illustrious personage! Thy noble father, during his earthly sojourn, did tread the path of salvation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص مجید پدر بزرگوارت در مدت حیات در سبیل نجات سلوک مینمود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
